title: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Tanker Report - March 11, 2025
summary:
Main
• A Fragile Recovery in VLCCs Amid Macro Headwinds - The VLCC market appeared to have found a temporary floor in early March, with shipowners showing renewed optimism for a potential recovery. Activity levels initially picked up as charterers sought to cover outstanding second-decade stems and advance bookings for the third-decade program. However, despite some resistance from owners, broader market weakness-particularly in other regions-has kept a significant rebound in check.
